name: Vishay Precision Group, Inc.
business: Vishay Precision Group, Inc. (VPG) is a global leader in precision measurement and sensing technologies that help power the future by bridging the physical world with the digital one. The company sells specialized sensors, weighing solutions, and measurement systems used across test and measurement, industrial, transportation, steel, avionics, military and space, agriculture, consumer, and medical markets. Products are marketed under brand names characterized as having a very high level of precision and quality.

exposures.sentence: Our strain gage products, which include our advanced sensors, are resistive sensors that are attached to the surface of an object to determine the surface strain caused by an applied force.
Emerging applications for our advanced sensors include industrial and medical robotics, as well as for consumer products.

Typical applications for force sensors are in construction machinery for stability control or overload protection, agricultural equipment for precision force measurement, and medical devices such as hospital beds and medication dosing.

Our Pacific Instruments business offers a broad range of high performance signal conditioning, data acquisition and control systems, many of which reach customers outside our traditional commercial customer base, such as U.S. government-related customers.

The main market segments for our precision resistors are as follows: avionics & military, space communications, fiber optics, industrial automation, EV battery management infrastructure, precision weighing, and test & measurement including semiconductor test and production, among others.

The main market segments for our precision resistors are as follows: avionics & military, space communications, fiber optics, industrial automation, EV battery management infrastructure, precision weighing, and test & measurement including semiconductor test and production, among others.

Our KELK business provides high accuracy and performance sensors and systems for the steel and aluminum industries, and within those industries, mainly for rolling mills.

DTS expands our offering in the automotive market and in the avionics, military and space market.

The Measurement Systems segment includes highly specialized systems for steel production, materials development, and safety testing.

catalysts.event: Announced expansion of senior management team with Chief Business and Product Officer and Chief Operating Officer
catalysts.sentence: As part of this change in strategy, on November 4, 2025, we announced the expansion of our senior management team with two newly created executive positions: Chief Business and Product Officer and Chief Operating Officer, both reporting to the Chief Executive Officer.

catalysts.event: Planned capital expenditures of approximately $15.6 million for 2026
catalysts.sentence: Capital expenditures for 2026 are expected to be approximately $15.6 million.
